settings.custom_liquid:
{%- liquid assign has_refill = false if product.tags contains 'Refillable' or product.tags contains 'refillable' or product.tags contains 'Refill' assign has_refill = true endif assign has_sub = false if product.selling_plan_groups.size > 0 assign has_sub = true endif assign has_vegan = false if product.tags contains 'Vegan' or product.tags contains 'vegan' assign has_vegan = true endif assign has_clean = false if product.tags contains 'Sulphate-free' or product.tags contains 'sulphate-free' or product.tags contains 'Clean' assign has_clean = true endif -%} {%- if has_refill or has_sub or has_vegan or has_clean -%}
{% if has_refill %}Refillable{% endif %} {% if has_sub %}Subscribable{% endif %} {% if has_vegan %}Vegan{% endif %} {% if has_clean %}Clean{% endif %}
{%- endif -%}
